# Scheduling

Operations related to scheduling. Scheduling operations provide information about service provider availability.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/blocks` | Create block. | Bearer token required |
| `DELETE` | `/blocks/{block_id}` | Delete block. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/blocks/{block_id}` | Get block. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/blocks/{block_id}` | Update block. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/regions` | List regions. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/scheduling/assignment` | Get scheduling assignment. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/scheduling/available-dates` | List available dates. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/scheduling/available-timeslots` | List available timeslots. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/scheduling/item-groupings` | List schedule item groupings. | Bearer token required |

## `GET /regions`

List regions.

List regions.

- Operation ID: `regions-get`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `RegionCollection`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `filter[type]` | `query` | No | enum (`COUNTRY`, `STATE`, `COUNTY`) | The type of the region. |
| `filter[country_code]` | `query` | No | string | The country code of the region. |
| `filter[state_code]` | `query` | No | string | The state code of the region. |
| `per_page` | `query` | No | string | The number of items per page. Defaults to 25. |
| `page` | `query` | No | string | The requested page. Defaults to 1. |

### Request Body

None.

## `GET /scheduling/assignment`

Get scheduling assignment.

Get scheduling assignment.

- Operation ID: `scheduling-assignment-get`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `CompanyTeamMemberResource`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |

| `company_team_member_ids` | `query` | No | array of string (uuid) | The IDs of company team members. UUID Version 4. |
| `strategy_type` | `query` | No | enum (`DISTANCE`, `HOURS_PRIORITY`, `ROUND_ROBIN`, `RECOMMENDED`, `PRIORITY_LIST`) | The strategy type to use for the scheduling assignment. |
| `appointment_date` | `query` | No | string (date-time) | The date of the appointment. |
| `appointment_duration` | `query` | No | integer | The duration of the appointment in minutes. |

### Request Body

None.

## `GET /scheduling/available-dates`

List available dates.

List available dates. Availability can be listed using a specific start & end date range, or using a timeframe. When using a timeframe, the page parameter can be used to flip through weeks, months, etc.

- Operation ID: `get-available-dates`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError403`, `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `CalendarDayCollection`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `filter[user_ids][]` | `query` | No | array of string (uuid) | The IDs of users whose availability will be listed. UUID Version 4. |
| `filter[appointment_id]` | `query` | No | string | Appointment ID used to list availability for an existing order |
| `filter[start_at]` | `query` | No | string (date-time) | Returns availability after start_at |
| `filter[end_at]` | `query` | No | string (date-time) | Returns availability before end_at |
| `filter[timeframe]` | `query` | No | enum (`DAY`, `WEEK`, `MONTH`, `YEAR`) | Returns availability for a specific timeframe. Used instead of start_at & end_at |
| `duration` | `query` | No | integer | Duration of the event to schedule. Required if appointment_id isn't specified |
| `interval` | `query` | No | integer | Interval of bookable timeslots starting at x minutes on the hour . Required if appointment_id isn't specified |
| `timezone` | `query` | Yes | string | The timezone of the client. Available dates results will be localized to this timezone |
| `page` | `query` | No | integer | The requested page of results. Use this parameter to flip through pages when using the timeframe filter |
| `per_page` | `query` | No | integer | The number of results per page. Only applies when using a date range |

### Request Body

None.

### Responses

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `200` | CalendarDayCollection | `application/json`: `CalendarDayCollection` |
| `403` | ApiError403 | `application/json`: `ApiError403` |
| `404` | ApiError404 | `application/json`: `ApiError404` |
| `422` | ApiFail422 | `application/json`: `ApiFail422` |
| `500` | ApiError500 | `application/json`: `ApiError500` |

## `GET /scheduling/available-timeslots`

List available timeslots.

List available timeslots. Timeslots are returned for the entire day in the local timezone. Results are returned in UTC!

- Operation ID: `get-available-timeslots`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError403`, `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `TimeslotCollection`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `filter[user_ids][]` | `query` | No | array of string (uuid) | The IDs of users whose appointments will be listed. UUID Version 4. |
| `filter[appointment_id]` | `query` | No | string | Appointment ID used to list availability for an existing order |
| `duration` | `query` | No | integer | Duration of the event to schedule. Required if appointment_id isn't specified |
| `interval` | `query` | No | integer | Interval of bookable timeslots starting at x minutes on the hour . Required if appointment_id isn't specified |
| `page` | `query` | No | integer | The requested page of results |
| `per_page` | `query` | No | integer | The number of results per page. Only applies when using a date range |
| `date` | `query` | Yes | string (date) | The date to list available timeslots |
| `timezone` | `query` | Yes | string | The timezone is used to determine the start and end time of the specified date to list a full day of results. |

### Request Body

None.

### Responses

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `200` | TimeslotCollection | `application/json`: `TimeslotCollection` |
| `403` | ApiError403 | `application/json`: `ApiError403` |
| `404` | ApiError404 | `application/json`: `ApiError404` |
| `422` | ApiFail422 | `application/json`: `ApiFail422` |
| `500` | ApiError500 | `application/json`: `ApiError500` |
